headline: Why Southern Company (SO) Is Riding Data Center Power Demand
summary: The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) is one of the utility stocks riding the 2026 “Reliability Shock.” On April 30, 2026, The Southern Company (NYSE:SO) reported first-quarter results showing how quickly data-center load is becoming part of its growth story. The company said adjusted earnings rose to $1.32 per share from $1.23 a year earlier, while operating […]
